data.description: The CEO of Tevogen has highlighted plans for acquiring new subsidiaries that could generate a revenue of over $50 million and maintain positive cash flow. These acquisitions are aimed at bolstering the company's long-term growth strategy.

data.title: Eightpoint Unveils the Next Evolution of NewsNow Home, Bringing Smarter Hyperlocal News to Android
data.description: Eightpoint has introduced a significant update to NewsNow Home, the Android news platform. This upgrade offers personalized news using business intelligence, hyperlocal relevance, and a more peaceful approach to staying informed. The aim is to provide users with timely hyperlocal information directly to their home screen.

data.title: Curve Finance alleges PancakeSwap copied their code and must get licensing to use it.
data.description: Curve Finance has informed PancakeSwap that in order to utilize the code developed by Curve and collaborate, it must complete the necessary licensing procedures. The requirements have been set by the Curve Finance team and all operations must comply with them.

data.title: Dfns Launches Payouts
data.description: Dfns has recently unveiled Payouts, an innovative API tailored for institutions seeking to seamlessly switch stablecoins to fiat and disburse payments to various bank accounts. This solution prioritizes maintaining wallet-level governance and controls. Presently, many fintechs and institutions face challenges with adhering to a singular payout provider or utilizing vertically integrated systems that bundle routing, pricing, custody, and settlement. By leveraging Payouts, entities can diversify their off-ramp strategies and enhance operational efficiencies.

data.title: Norris McLaughlin P.A. Chair David C. Roberts Debuts NJ Business Divorce Video Series
data.description: On March 6, 2026, in Bridgewater, New Jersey, the legal establishment Norris McLaughlin, P.A., disclosed the introduction of the New Jersey Business Divorce video collection featuring David C. Roberts, Esq., who serves as the firm's Chair. This exclusive video series is set to debut on March 12, 2026, via the firm's online platform.

data.title: Betterness Introduces the Agentic Health & Wellness MCP
data.description: Betterness has launched the Betterness MCP on March 6, 2026, in Miami and San Francisco. This new protocol allows AI agents to coordinate diagnostics, biomarker data, providers, and health intelligence within real-world health systems. The Betterness MCP aims to enhance coordination and communication between various health entities through its agentic Model Context Protocol.

data.title: Metropolitan Wins Silver for Best Tasting Tap Water in United States
data.description: In Los Angeles, the tap water provided by the Metropolitan Water District of Southern California has been recognized as one of the best-tasting in the United States. Judges at the 36th Berkeley Springs International Water Tasting competition, featuring over 100 entries from five continents, awarded Metropolitan second place in the municipal water category. This marks the eighth medal the agency has earned in this global competition.
